response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior full-stack software craftsman with ~14 years of professional experience across web, backend, embedded, and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the role targets a Director-level Principal Engineer in AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI thought leadership at scale. The resume shows no demonstrated AI products, no advanced AI degree, and no evidence of operating at principal/director-level scope advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI futures. Recent AI-adjacent work is brief and infrastructure-oriented rather than strategic.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, OSS contributions, workshops, and public talks
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms built and shipped at scale; AI exposure is recent and limited in depth
Career trajectory is senior IC, not principal/director-level — no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI roadmaps
Limited cloud platform breadth (some AWS CDK) and no signal of recognized industry expertise expected at this level

key_factors.factor: Lacks recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level Principal IC scope
Strong engineering craftsmanship and polyglot delivery record
